SHAAK_LOOT.Settings.DefaultName.Name: Default Container Name
SHAAK_LOOT.Settings.DefaultName.Hint: The default name assigned to new loot containers when placed on a scene.
SHAAK_LOOT.Settings.ImageFolder.Name: Token Image Folder
SHAAK_LOOT.Settings.ImageFolder.Hint: Path to a folder containing container token images. Leave empty to use the bundled defaults. Example: my-images/containers
SHAAK_LOOT.Settings.PlacementMode.Name: Placement Mode
SHAAK_LOOT.Settings.PlacementMode.Hint: Silent: drops the container immediately with default settings. Dialog: shows a popup to customize name and image before placing.
SHAAK_LOOT.Dialog.Title: Place Loot Container
